utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 top-level items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Check each for full specification with costs. 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with explicit monthly costs and a total health cost; fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with cost, plus related items and total property cost; fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs, including total travel cost; fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with an 'Included' cost indicator; costs are specified as included; considered fully specified. 5) total_budget: provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown; fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific named plans/services: PrimeCare Premium Plan for physical health, PrimeCare Premium Plan for mental health, EliteHome Premium Coverage for home contents, Home Security System Integration (matches Home Security System Discount), Technology & Business Equipment Protection (matches Technology Protection), PrimeTravel Premium Plan for base travel, and Business Travel Support. I matched each to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings and extracted the exact ratings.
